channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Omar confronted on camera over GOP proposal targeting foreign-born lawmakers: 'Good luck to her'
item.description: Rep. Ilhan Omar responds to Rep. Nancy Mace's proposed constitutional amendment that would bar foreign-born individuals from serving in Congress.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: Beyond the Gunman: The Dark Truth About Who Is Really Setting the Tone for Violence
AOC Expands National Profile Amid 2028 Buzz
item.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez is intensifying her national political activity as speculation grows over whether the progressive Democrat will launch a...

item.title: Trump Endorses Ty Masterson in Kansas Governor Race
item.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday endorsed Ty Masterson in the Republican primary for governor of Kansas, throwing his support behind the longtime stat...
